item.name: Allagan Silver Piece
item.description:
Currency minted in the Third Astral Era by the Allagan Empire.

Exchangeable for gil.

obj.n: A Feast to Say the Least
For the Good of the Guild
Gone till the Sixth Astral Moon
Or Ever the Silver Cord Be Loosed
The Fox in the Hen House
The Things We Do for Cheese
Bury Me Not on the Lone Prairie
Into the Eye of the Storm
Like Fish Passing in the Night
Waiting for the Wind to Change
He Who Would Not Be Denied
Why Does the Caged Bird Sing
The Man Who Slew Too Much
Against the Dying of the Light
As Goes Light, So Goes Darkness
For Those We Can Yet Save
Do Goldsmiths Dream of Gilded Sheep
